channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Why 'time to token' is the new battleground for data centers
item.description: The disconnect between the pace of software capabilities and physical constraints of data center infrastructure.

item.title: I was surprised by how well Keychron’s new mouse performed — but one aspect might disappoint FPS players
item.description: The Keychron G5 boasts plenty of features at a reasonable price — but does it measure up to the heavyweight hitters?

item.title: Amazon brade le Samsung Galaxy S26 à 699 € au lieu de 999 €, quelques jours avant le Galaxy Unpacked
item.description: Le Samsung Galaxy S26, fleuron compact de la gamme 2026, est en ce moment disponible à 699 euros au lieu de 999 euros sur Amazon. Une remise de 300 euros sur le dernier-né de Samsung, à quelques jours du Galaxy Unpacked prévu le 22 juillet.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 et Ultra 2 : une grosse fuite annonce des prix en hausse pour toutes les versions
item.description: Roland Quandt, réputé pour être un leaker fiable, a fait fuiter les prix européens des Galaxy Watch 9 et Watch Ultra 2, attendues le 22 juillet. Chaque modèle coûterait plus cher que son prédécesseur.

item.title: The 6 best 4K Blu-rays released in 2026 that we've tested — which movies make the most of your TV and soundbar or speakers?
item.description: We recommend six great Blu-ray discs that make the most of the medium, and the most of your home AV setup.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 et Z Flip 8 : les prix européens fuitent, en hausse de 100 à près de 300 euros
item.description: Le site WinFuture dévoile en avance les prix de la nouvelle gamme de smartphones pliables de Samsung. La crise de la RAM est passée par là, avec une augmentation de 100 à près de 300 euros.

item.title: PlayStation just struck a hammer blow to game preservation
item.description: Killing game discs is an anti-consumer move that only benefits Sony.

item.title: What are 2026's 5-star tech products for far? Here are the 25+ products that earned top marks in our tough hands-on testing
item.description: These are the gadgets that have aced our tough TR tests this year.

item.title: I test headphones and earbuds for a living — these are the 8 standout releases of 2026 so far, from Apple, Marshall, Shokz, Sennheiser and more
item.description: Four sets of headphones; four pairs of earbuds: I look back at the best I've tested so far this year, and select my own antithesis to the 'hateful eight'

item.title: A stunning low light capture of a volcanic eruption in Guatemala sweeps the 2026 iPhone Photography Awards — and it was taken on an iPhone 15 Pro
item.description: Turns out you don't need the latest tech to win prestigious prizes.

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelces wedding guest list reportedly excludes these people
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s reported MSG wedding has sparked questions about who is invited — and who isn’t.

item.title: À peine déballée, déjà morte : un joueur voit sa Steam Machine lâcher après seulement 20 minutes de jeu
item.description: Un acheteur malchanceux de la Steam Machine a vu sa console mourir devant ses yeux seulement 20 minutes après l'avoir lancée. Il s'agit pour l'instant d'un cas isolé.

item.title: Bientôt des jeux vidéo Koh-Lanta, Secret Story, Camping Paradis ? TF1 s’inspire de Netflix avec la gamification de sa plateforme TF1+
item.description: Honnêtement, un jeu Koh-Lanta dans le genre RPG/gestion de camp ou un jeu Danse avec les stars à la Just Dance n'était pas dans mon bingo 2026. Des concepts qui pourraient pourtant devenir réalité à la rentrée prochaine. S'inspirant de Netflix, TF1 compte à son tour lancer des jeux vidéo autour de ses franchises.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for July 3, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for July 3, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Apple TV is hitting its stride
item.description: Since its inception, Apple TV, née Apple TV Plus, has built a reputation on quality over quantity. It has far fewer shows and movies than the likes of Netflix or Disney Plus, but generally speaking, the projects it does put out are quite good. It's a strategy that has brought comparisons to the HBO of […]

item.title: Free up iCloud space in 15 minutes on your iPhone
item.description: Learn how to free up iCloud storage on your iPhone by finding and removing large photos and videos before paying for more space.

item.title: Argentine – Cap-Vert : comment voir le 16e de finale en streaming ?
item.description: L'Argentine entre dans la phase à élimination directe de la Coupe du monde 2026 face au Cap-Vert, dans la nuit de vendredi à samedi. Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir : l'heure du coup d'envoi, la chaîne qui diffuse le match et les solutions pour le suivre en streaming.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for July 3, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1840 on July 3 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Midjourney’s medical scanner leaves many questions unanswered
item.description: Midjourney has shown more of its futuristic medical scanner. It still hasn't shown much proof it works. The AI startup, best known for generating images, released a behind-the-scenes video of its dunk-tank ultrasound scanner, which it plans to deploy in spas and hopes will transform medicine with cheap, detailed, radiation-free imaging. The nearly 20-minute tour […]...

item.title: We went to Madonnas steamy Grindr London party. Heres what happened.
item.description: Following a Times Square takeover with Grindr, Madonna once again linked up with the GBTQ dating app to launch her new album, "Confessions II." Mashable went to the party.

item.title: Best Bone Conduction Headphones (2026): Shokz, Suunto, Mojawa
item.description: Everyone needs a safe way to listen to music on outdoor runs. We’ve found the bone conduction headphones to grab on your way out the door.

item.title: New report claims companies which embrace AI also add more workers (eventually)
item.description: High-intensity AI adopters saw employment rise by around 10% during the first two years of AI adoption, despite gained productivity.

item.title: Le retour de Fable se précise avec un meilleur prix de précommande sur Xbox Series X que sur PS5
item.description: Fable est un retour aux sources du fameux jeu de Peter Molyneux qui sera disponible sur Xbox Series X et S le 23 février 2027. Amazon et Cdiscount proposent déjà de le précommander pour 54,99 euros au lieu de 69,99 euros.

item.title: Xerox C255a review: I much prefer Xerox’s reboot of Lexmark’s laser printer
item.description: Xerox is targeting the hybrid workforce with this mid-priced multifunction device.

item.title: Apple's iPhone Ultra could raise foldable prices by almost 20% — no wonder Samsung isn't scared of its arrival
item.description: Book-style foldable phone prices could increase a lot this year, but clamshell models might actually drop in price.

item.title: Penélope Cruzs Hot Ones episode features a lot of yelling in Spanish
item.description: Penélope Cruz sat down opposite host Sean Evans to take on the "Hot Ones" challenge.

item.title: Sony estime pouvoir encore augmenter le prix du PlayStation Plus
item.description: Alors que le PlayStation Plus a déjà connu plusieurs ajustements tarifaires, les hauts responsables de Sony n’écartent pas l’idée d’une nouvelle hausse de prix. Une décision qui pourrait encore faire grincer des dents chez les joueurs.

item.title: Sony already invested $34 million to repurpose its EU PlayStation disc factory
item.description: Sony is converting its PlayStation disc factory into a plant for optical microlenses.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro : Apple utiliserait un stockage plus lent sur les versions 1 To et 2 To
item.description: Une fuite affirme qu’Apple compte glisser du stockage plus lent dans les iPhone 18 Pro les mieux dotés, ceux à 1 et 2 To.

item.title: Microsoft filing shows how it shifts profits around to reduce its European tax bill
item.description: A new mandatory compliance report released by Microsoft shows how it declares profits in different European nations to reduce its tax bill.

item.title: I tried Clean Up in the iOS 27 developer beta, and Apple's AI-powered image editing tool is finally worth using — but there's a big caveat
item.description: I put an early version of Clean Up in iOS 27 to the test against its iOS 26 equivalent, and the results surprised me.

item.title: All Your Favorite Gadgets Are Getting Way More Expensive … Again
item.description: Thanks to the AI-driven chip shortage, prices for phones, computers, and consoles are sky-high—and still climbing.

item.title: The secret AI that could help explain this wild World Cup
item.description: Cape Verde! Germany’s knockout! It’s not just the expanded field causing these upsets. Meet the unsung tech giant whose data platform has leveled the playing field. This year’s FIFA World Cup has been unusually volatile. The expanded 48-team format has produced a string of surprise results—including Cape Verde, ranked 67th and playing in its first World Cup, holding cofavorite Spain to a scoreless draw in Atlanta before coming from behind to draw 2-2 with Uruguay....

item.title: Fourth of July 2026 food deals: List of promos for America’s 250th birthday includes Starbucks, Burger King, Dunkin, KFC, and more
item.description: This weekend, there’s no shortage of red, white, and blue offerings from fast food chains—from burgers and chicken to coffee and donuts. America’s 250th birthday is just around the corner, and fast food brands are ready to celebrate life, liberty, and the pursuit of food and drink deals.

item.title: The Jackery Explorer 1000 V2 is 'one of the best portable power stations' we've ever tested — and it's plummeted in price at Amazon this summer
item.description: Jackery Explorer 1000 V2 has a 1070Wh battery, 1500W output, and a big discount at Amazon
